string.text:
A rugged 1x holographic sight with a fast EBR-CQB reticle, night vision mode, and a large viewing window for rapid target acquisition. Its durable, fog-resistant design and intuitive controls ensure seamless operation in any lighting condition, with a bright setting for daylight and a dim, NVG-compatible mode for low light.
 
 %c[0,255,255,255]PROPERTIES:
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Origin: %c[ui_gray_2]United States
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]Vortex Optics
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[0,255,255,255] Magnification: %c[ui_gray_2]1x
